projects.title: Glam Studio Salon
projects.description: A premium unisex salon website with elegant pink theme, online booking integration, and WhatsApp-powered client engagement. Increased monthly bookings by 40%.

projects.title: EduQuest Academy
projects.description: Interactive online learning platform with course showcase, mentor profiles, and enrollment system. Serves 50,000+ active students with a clean, modern interface.

projects.title: Urban Space Interiors
projects.description: Luxury interior design portfolio with immersive project galleries, 3D design process visualization, and consultation booking. Dark premium aesthetic with gold accents.

projects.title: Pink Bliss Beauty Studio
projects.description: Luxury women's salon with sophisticated purple theme. Features organic products showcase, animated service cards, and premium booking experience.

projects.title: BuildRight Construction
projects.description: Professional construction company website with project portfolio, real-time stats showcase, and quote request functionality. Robust industrial amber theme.

projects.title: Nova Fashion Store
projects.description: Elegant fashion e-commerce store with split layout design, gold accents, and WhatsApp ordering integration. Premium luxury shopping experience with catalog management.

projects.title: Spice Route Restaurant
projects.description: Multi-cuisine restaurant website with an interactive digital menu, table reservations, and online ordering powered by WhatsApp. Warm, inviting design with food photography.

projects.title: HealWell Multi-Specialty Clinic
projects.description: Modern healthcare website with doctor profiles, online appointment booking, and patient portal. Clean, trustworthy UI with accessibility-first design.
